EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriShapeModifiers

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Bits that can be added to the esriGeneral... shape types.

[Guid("9184F0DA-1C3C-4CDC-8E1A-1D2548601928")]
public enum esriShapeModifiers

Fields

esriShapeBasicModifierMask = -1073741824

-1073741824: The shape has Zs or Ms.

esriShapeBasicTypeMask = 255

255: Mask to check only the low-order two bits of Modifier information.

esriShapeExtendedModifierMask = -587202560

-587202560: The shape has Zs or Ms.

esriShapeHasCurves = 536870912

536870912: The shape has non-linear segments.

esriShapeHasIDs = 268435456

268435456: The shape has identifiers (IDs) on some or all vertices/points.

esriShapeHasMaterials = 16777216

16777216: The shape has Material attributes (Multipatch-specific attribute).

esriShapeHasMs = 1073741824

1073741824: The shape has measures (Ms) on some or all vertices/points.

esriShapeHasNormals = 134217728

134217728: The shape has Normals on each vertex (Multipatch-specific attribute).

esriShapeHasPartIDs = 33554432

33554432: The shape has PartID attributes (Multipatch-specific attribute).

esriShapeHasTextures = 67108864

67108864: The shape has Texture attributes (Multipatch-specific attribute).

esriShapeHasZs = -2147483648

-2147483648: The shape has heights (Zs) on all vertices/points.

esriShapeIsCompressed = 8388608

8388608: The shape is Compressed (Multipatch-specific attribute).

esriShapeModifierMask = -16777216

-16777216: Mask to check only the high-order two bits of Modifier information.

esriShapeMultiPatchModifierMask = 15728640

15728640: Mask to check only the high-order four bits of Modifier information.

esriShapeNonBasicModifierMask = 1056964608

1056964608: The shape does not have Zs or Ms.
